confirm.activate: के तपाईं यो निर्वाचन सक्रिय गर्न चाहनुहुन्छ? | Are you sure you want to activate this election?
confirm.publish: के तपाईं परिणाम प्रकाशित गर्न चाहनुहुन्छ? | Are you sure you want to publish the election results?
confirm.unpublish: के तपाईं परिणाम हटाउन चाहनुहुन्छ? | Are you sure you want to unpublish the election results?
confirm.open_voting: के तपाईं मतदान खोल्न चाहनुहुन्छ? | Are you sure you want to open the voting period?
confirm.close_voting: के तपाईं मतदान बन्द गर्न चाहनुहुन्छ? | Are you sure you want to close the voting period?

actions.submit_for_approval: अनुमोदनको लागि पेश गर्नुहोस् | Submit for Approval

modals.submit_for_approval: निर्वाचन अनुमोदनको लागि पेश गर्नुहोस् | Submit Election for Approval
modals.submit_checklist: पेश गर्नु अघि सबै आवश्यक सेटअप पूर्ण भएको सुनिश्चित गर्नुहोस् | Before submission, ensure all required setup is complete:
modals.posts_created: कम्तिमा १ पद सिर्जना गरिएको | At least 1 post created
modals.candidates_approved: कम्तिमा १ उम्मेदवार अनुमोदित | At least 1 candidate approved
modals.voters_registered: कम्तिमा १ मतदाता दर्ता | At least 1 voter registered
modals.complete_setup: पेश गर्नु अघि कृपया सबै आवश्यक सेटअप पूरा गर्नुहोस् | Please complete all required setup before submitting.
modals.approval_notes_placeholder: अनुमोदनको बारेमा वैकल्पिक नोटहरू थप्नुहोस् | Add optional notes about approval...
modals.rejection_reason_placeholder: कृपया अस्वीकारको विस्तृत कारण प्रदान गर्नुहोस् | Please provide a detailed reason for rejection...
modals.min_characters: न्यूनतम १० क्यारेक्टर आवश्यक | Minimum 10 characters required
modals.reason_required: कारण आवश्यक छ | Reason is required
modals.reason_min_length: कारण कम्तिमा १० क्यारेक्टरको हुनुपर्छ | Reason must be at least 10 characters
modals.review_and_process: निर्वाचन सबमिशन समीक्षा र अनुमोदन/अस्वीकार गर्नुहोस् | Review and approve/reject election submissions
modals.no_pending: कुनै पेन्डिङ निर्वाचन छैन | No pending elections
modals.all_processed: सबै निर्वाचन सबमिशन प्रशोधित भएका छन् | All election submissions have been processed
